scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check assets/app.js && node --check api/extract.js && node --check api/rules.js && node --check api/static.js
scripts.build: mkdir -p public/assets dist/assets && cp index.html public/index.html && cp assets/app.js public/assets/app.js && cp assets/styles.css public/assets/styles.css && cp index.html dist/index.html && cp assets/app.js dist/assets/app.js && cp assets/styles.css dist/assets/styles.css
